comparison.interpretation: Heuristic output is a cognitive proxy summary. The learned classifier predicts dataset task labels from event-locked EEG epochs. Neither is mind reading.

validation.scientific_note: Hardware validation assesses timestamp consistency, channel mapping, and proxy SQI. It is not clinical validation.
